module.name: no-re-export
module.description: Disallow direct or indirect re-export statements from parent or ancestor modules; barrel files (index.*) are exempt from this restriction.

scenarios.name: should allow re-exports in a barrel index file
scenarios.given: export { foo } from './foo' inside an index.ts barrel file
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the export declaration

scenarios.name: should allow re-exports from a same-level sibling module in a non-barrel file
scenarios.given: export { foo } from './foo' in a regular source file
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the export declaration

scenarios.name: should allow exporting a local binding derived from a parent import
scenarios.given: import { foo } from '../foo' followed by const local = foo and export { local } in a non-barrel file
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the export declaration

scenarios.name: should report a re-export from a parent module in a non-barrel file
scenarios.given: export { bar } from '../bar' in a non-index source file
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the export declaration

scenarios.name: should report a pass-through named export of a parent import in a non-barrel file
scenarios.given: import { bar } from '../bar' followed by export { bar } in a non-index source file
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the export declaration

scenarios.name: should fix redundant pass-through export specifiers already directly exported
scenarios.given: export const bar = 1; import { bar as parentBar } from '../bar'; export { parentBar as bar }
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the pass-through export specifier
scenarios.then: a noReExport violation is reported with a fix that removes only the redundant specifier

scenarios.name: should report a pass-through named export of a parent import regardless of statement ordering
scenarios.given: export { bar } followed later by import { bar } from '../bar' in a non-index source file
scenarios.when: the rule precomputes parent-imported bindings from the full program and evaluates the export declaration

scenarios.name: should report a pass-through default export of a parent import in a non-barrel file
scenarios.given: import bar from '../../bar' followed by export default bar in a non-index source file
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the export declaration

scenarios.name: should report a TypeScript export assignment of a parent import in a non-barrel file
scenarios.given: import bar = require('../bar') followed by export = bar in a non-index source file
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the export assignment
